scholarships.name: AIC-DSU Foundation Scholarships
scholarships.sponsor: NITI Aayog, Government of India & Dayananda Sagar University
scholarships.eligibility: Young achievers with a master’s degree in Science/Engineering interested in doctoral research. Preference for candidates with research/industry experience.
scholarships.apply_procedure: Refer official AIC-DSU portal for application details.

scholarships.name: Post Matric Scholarships Scheme for Minorities
scholarships.sponsor: Ministry of Minority Affairs, Government of India
scholarships.eligibility: Students belonging to Muslim, Christian, Sikh, Buddhist, Jain, Parsi communities studying in India as per scheme guidelines.

scholarships.name: Post-Matric Scholarship for Students with Disabilities
scholarships.sponsor: Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities
scholarships.eligibility: Students with disabilities defined under Rights of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2016.
scholarships.apply_procedure: Apply through official government scholarship portal.

scholarships.name: Central Sector Scheme of Scholarships
scholarships.sponsor: Department of Higher Education, Government of India
scholarships.eligibility: Students above 80th percentile in Class XII and pursuing regular courses.

scholarships.name: PRAGATI Scholarship Scheme for Girl Students
scholarships.eligibility: Maximum two girl children per family. Family income less than ₹8 lakh per annum.

scholarships.name: SAKSHAM Scholarship Scheme
scholarships.eligibility: Specially-abled student (≥40% disability). Family income less than ₹8 lakh per annum.

scholarships.name: Post Matric Scholarship for SC/ST Students
scholarships.sponsor: Department of Social Welfare, Government of Karnataka
scholarships.eligibility: SC/ST students. Income below ₹2.5 lakh or as per government norms.

scholarships.name: E-PASS / KAREPASS
scholarships.sponsor: Dept of Backward Class Welfare, Government of Karnataka
scholarships.eligibility: OBC students. Parental income below specified limits.

scholarships.name: Jindal Scholarship
scholarships.apply_procedure: Download application from official website, submit signed copy to foundation office.

scholarships.name: Dharmasthala Kshemabiruddi Sanga Scholarship
scholarships.apply_procedure: Submit application at organization office after institute signature.
